title: Move, Samurott!
description: Gives Samurott a nice new coat of animations! A Cobblemon Resource Pack.
body:
**This is a resourcepack that gives Samurott and its Hisuian form a complete animation overhaul!**

---
Each animation was made by me, V0cal, and if I see a need for a new animation I will add it in a new version. However, this will likely only happen with moves that don't make sense with their current animations at all, if at all. 

This resource pack is server friendly.
![Two Samurott walking along a beach.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c8af36304e0bdaf1bdb5692704ee1949fa1c18d.png)

Animations Added/Overhauled:
- Ground Idle
- Water Idle
- Swimming
- Walking
- Sleeping
- Battle Idle
- Battle Idle (Water)
- Faint
- Faint (Water)
- Battle Cry
- Cry
- Recoil/Hit
- Status Move Animation
- Special Move Animation
- Physical Move Animation
- Status Move Animation (Water)
- Special Move Animation (Water)
- Physical Move Animation (Water)
# 
##### _NOTE: THIS RESOURCE PACK SLIGHTLY CHANGES THE MODEL OF SAMUROTT AND ITS HISUIAN FORM, IT MAY INTERFERE WITH OTHER RESOURCE PACKS._
